items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite: Our most cost-effective AI model yet
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google has been actively releasing Gemini model updates and app improvements in early 2026. On the model side, Gemini 3.1 Pro was announced as Google's latest flagship model, achieving a 77.1% score on ARC-AGI-2 benchmarks for complex reasoning, and is available via the Gemini app, NotebookLM, Gemini API, and Vertex AI for Pro/Ultra subscribers. Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite was also introduced as the most cost-efficient model in the series at $0.25/1M input tokens, delivering 2.5x faster time-to-first-

items.title: Read Google DeepMind's new paper on responsible AGI — Google Blog
items.author: blog.google
items.snippet: Google DeepMind has been prolific in early 2026 with several high-impact research announcements. In March 2026, DeepMind published findings on AI manipulation risks, releasing the first empirically validated toolkit to measure AI manipulation in real-world settings — a significant contribution to AI safety research. The lab also published theoretical work including 'The Abstraction Fallacy: Why AI Can Simulate But Not Instantiate Consciousness' (March 10, 2026), continuing DeepMind's engagement

items.title: Migrate from Gemini 3 Pro Preview to Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview before March 9, 2026 - Google AI Developers Forum
items.author: discuss.ai.google.dev
items.snippet: Google's Gemini API has seen significant updates in early 2026. The most notable recent changes include the deprecation of Gemini 3 Pro Preview (shut down March 9, 2026), with the gemini-3-pro-preview alias now automatically pointing to gemini-3.1-pro-preview. Additionally, gemini-2.5-flash-lite-preview-09-2025 is being shut down March 31, 2026. New features launched include Computer Use tool support in gemini-3-pro-preview and gemini-3-flash-preview, and Cloud Storage / pre-signed URL support a

items.title: Google AI Studio's Biggest Update Yet: UI Overhaul and New Developer Features
items.author: www.androidsage.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio received its biggest update in March 2026, centered around the Google Antigravity coding agent — a more powerful, context-aware AI that fundamentally changes how apps are built inside AI Studio. The new Antigravity agent maintains a deeper understanding of entire project structures and chat history, enabling developers to build multiplayer experiences, add databases, connect to real-world services, and deploy production-ready applications without leaving the vibe coding environm

items.title: Generate and edit images on Vertex AI | Generative AI on Vertex AI
items.author: docs.cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Imagen 4 is Google's latest image generation model available through both the Gemini API (ai.google.dev) and Vertex AI (cloud.google.com). The Gemini API exposes Imagen 4 under the model ID `imagen-4.0-generate-preview-06-06` (or stable variants like `imagen-4.0-generate-001`), supporting text-to-image generation with configurable aspect ratios (1:1, 3:4, 4:3, 9:16, 16:9), output formats (JPEG/PNG), and safety filters. The API accepts a text prompt and optional parameters such as number of image

items.title: Get started with Genkit - Firebase
items.author: firebase.google.com
items.snippet:
Genkit is an open-source framework by Google/Firebase for building full-stack AI-powered applications, supporting JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Python. It provides built-in primitives for flows, prompts, tools, and multi-agent systems with observability, type safety, and evaluations baked in. Flows are the core execution unit — special typed functions with streaming, telemetry, and tooling support.

For agent development, Genkit supports multi-agent architectures where specialized agents are co

items.title: Google Gen AI Python SDK (googleapis/python-genai)
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: The google-gemini GitHub organization (github.com/google-gemini) has seen significant activity in early 2026. The most notable development is the deprecation and archival of the legacy generative-ai-python SDK, which was formally retired on November 30, 2025 and archived on December 16, 2025. Google has migrated developers to the new unified Google Gen AI Python SDK at googleapis/python-genai, which supports both the Gemini Developer API and Vertex AI APIs, and includes features like multimodal

It provides built-in primitives for flows, prompts, tools, and multi-agent systems with observability, type safety, and evaluations baked in. Flows are the core execution unit — special typed functions with streaming, telemetry, and tooling support.

items.title: Google AI Studio is the Secret Weapon for Vibe Coding
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has emerged as a major player in the 'vibe coding' movement, offering a full-stack app development experience driven entirely by natural language prompts. In early 2026, Google launched a significant update to AI Studio enabling full-stack runtimes with server-side logic, secure secrets management, and npm package support — all from the browser. The platform integrates with Firebase for database and authentication, Google Cloud Secret Manager for API key security, and Cloud Run

items.title: Google partners with Agile Robots, growing its AI robotics footprint — CNBC
items.author: www.cnbc.com
items.snippet: Google AI (@GoogleAI) and Google DeepMind (@GoogleDeepMind) have been active on X (Twitter) in early 2026 with a series of major announcements. Most recently, Google DeepMind announced a research partnership with Agile Robots (March 24, 2026) to integrate Gemini Robotics foundation models with their hardware for next-generation robotics. Earlier in March, Google unveiled AlphaEarth Foundations — an AI model functioning like a virtual satellite to help scientists address food security, deforestat
